title: Cycling Training — Science Reference
summary: Cycling Training — Science Reference --- ## Power Meter Fundamentals ### Why power matters Heart rate lags effort by 30–90 seconds and is confounded by heat, caffeine, fatigue, and stress. Power is instantaneous and objective. For pacing climbs, intervals, and long events, power gives the clearest signal.
